description: Convert extracted parameters into the required JSON function call format with proper array wrapping

inputs.name: function_data
inputs.description: Dictionary containing function name and parameters extracted from the query

output.description: Returns formatted function call as array: [{"solve_quadratic": {"a": [2], "b": [5], "c": [3]}}]

workflow_spec.name: Function Call Generator
workflow_spec.description: Parses user queries to extract function parameters and generates appropriate function calls in JSON format
